page_metadata.biotools__summary: Fast inference and visualization of ancestral scenarios. PastML infers ancestral characters on a rooted phylogenetic tree with annotated tips, using maximum likelihood or parsimony. The result is then visualised as a zoomable html map.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Fast inference and visualization of ancestral scenarios. PastML infers ancestral characters on a rooted phylogenetic tree with annotated tips, using maximum likelihood or parsimony. The result is then visualised as a zoomable html map.
